player_notes.og anunoby: Fully practiced Friday and Saturday; says hamstring not as bad as 2024 injury. Trending toward available for ECF Game 1 — monitor official game-day status.
player_notes.jalen williams: Declared himself healthy entering WCF after missing 6 games with a Grade 1 left hamstring strain. Expect return to starting role and normal minutes vs. Spurs.

game_notes.OKC vs SAS: Jalen Williams returning from 6-game hamstring absence; his presence restores OKC's full rotation and affects usage/minutes distribution for other Thunder wings.

suggested_context_updates.player_or_team: CLE vs DET — Playoff Series Status
suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The season context document contains no R2 series diary for CLE vs DET, and the playoff bracket section does not reflect R2 matchups or series scores.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms CLE vs DET is in a Game 7 (Eastern Conference semifinals, R2), with DET winning Game 6 115-94 (Cunningham 21 pts) to force it. The series is ongoing at R2, not R1. The context doc's R1 bracket shows DET vs ORL and CLE vs TOR — both of those series are over and these teams have advanced to face each other in R2.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add R2 series diary for DET vs CLE (Eastern Conference Semifinals). Document that DET won Game 6 115-94 (Cunningham 21) to force Game 7. Series is tied 3-3 heading into Game 7 on or around May 17-18. Update playoff bracket to reflect R2 matchups.

suggested_context_updates.player_or_team: SAS vs MIN — Playoff Series Status
suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The context doc's R1 diary for DEN vs MIN ends with MIN winning the series 4-2. There is no R2 series entry for SAS vs MIN.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms SAS eliminated MIN in Game 6 of what must be an R2 series (139-109 blowout), with Castle, Fox, and Harper accounting for nearly half of SAS's scoring. Edwards walked over to congratulate the Spurs after the loss. SAS advances to the Western Conference Finals vs OKC.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add R2 series diary for SAS vs MIN showing SAS wins 4-2, with Game 6 being a 139-109 SAS blowout (Castle 32 pts). Edwards confirmed played despite prior left knee injury concerns. Update playoff bracket to show SAS advances to WCF vs OKC.

suggested_context_updates.player_or_team: OKC vs SAS — Western Conference Finals
suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The context doc has no entry for the Western Conference Finals. The R1 OKC vs PHX diary ends with OKC advancing.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms OKC vs SAS Western Conference Finals is scheduled, with Game 1 imminent (headline: 'Wembanyama and the Spurs visit Oklahoma City to start Western Conference finals'). The NBA MVP announcement was timed for the day before Game 1.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add WCF matchup entry for (1) OKC vs (2) SAS. Series has not yet begun as of the news date. Game 1 is in Oklahoma City.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: R1 OKC vs PHX diary: 'Jalen Williams' hamstring recovery timeline is the primary OKC health variable heading into the next round'; 'Jalen Williams still OUT (hamstring)' noted through the series sweep.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News headline: 'Thunder's Jalen Williams says he's healthy entering WCF' — Williams declared himself healthy after missing the past six games due to a Grade 1 left hamstring strain.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Jalen Williams' injury status to HEALTHY/ACTIVE for the WCF. Remove the 'primary health variable' caveat — he has self-declared fit and the hamstring concern that persisted through R1 is resolved. Treat as fully available for OKC vs SAS Game 1.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The NYK vs ATL R1 series diary ends with NYK winning 4-2. No R2 health concerns for Anunoby are documented in the context. The injury landscape section has no entry for Anunoby.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms Anunoby has a right hamstring injury and has been practicing — 'Anunoby practices again, says hamstring not as bad as '24' and 'OG Anunoby (hamstring) full participant in practice.' NYK is preparing for Eastern Conference Finals (Game 1 on Sunday or Tuesday).
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add Anunoby right hamstring injury to the Active Injury Concerns section. He is a full practice participant and believes it is less severe than his 2024 hamstring issue, but this is a new documented injury concern heading into the ECF. Flag as monitor/day-to-day and note full practice participation as of May 16.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Injury landscape: 'Edwards confirmed OUT for G5 with severity still unclear. Treat as a primary injury concern for G6.' DEN vs MIN diary ends with MIN winning series 4-2 with Edwards OUT for Game 6.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms Edwards played in at least one subsequent game (headline references him walking to the Spurs bench after a SAS vs MIN game to congratulate them, implying he played or was present in the R2 series). The description 'Edwards unsure how Wolves can get over hump after loss to Spurs' confirms MIN lost to SAS in R2 and Edwards was involved/present, suggesting he returned at some point in R2.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Note that Edwards apparently returned for some portion of the SAS vs MIN R2 series (given his post-game interaction with SAS bench). Update his status to reflect he played in R2 but MIN was eliminated. The specific games and minutes he appeared in R2 should be documented when available.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The context doc shows NYK won R1 vs ATL 4-2. No R2 matchup is documented.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News references 'Knicks' ECF preparations' with Anunoby practicing for Eastern Conference Finals, Game 1 'on either Sunday or Tuesday.' NYK is in the ECF.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add NYK's R2 result and ECF matchup. Determine NYK's R2 opponent (likely PHI given the bracket) and their series result, then document the ECF matchup. NYK is preparing to host ECF Game 1.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Injury landscape: 'Kerr expressed uncertainty about his coaching future after the loss' (after GSW's play-in elimination vs PHX).
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News headline: 'Kerr critical of coaching job, excited for return to Warriors' — Kerr has decided to return to GSW for a 13th season, resolving the uncertainty noted in the context doc.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Kerr's status: he has confirmed he is returning to GSW for the 2026-27 season. Remove the 'uncertainty about his coaching future' note and replace with 'confirmed returning for 13th season.'

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: No mention of Harden's all-time playoff scoring rank in the context document.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms Harden passed Stephen Curry for 10th place on the NBA's all-time postseason scoring list during Game 6 of the CLE vs DET Eastern Conference semifinal. This is a new factual data point about his career standing.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Minor update: add to Harden's player note that he passed Curry for 10th on the all-time playoff scoring list during the 2026 playoffs. Not operationally critical for prop-picking but relevant context.
